question: Two Nobel laureates died in July 2026: the 1992 Nobel Chemistry laureate who developed the theory of electron-transfer reactions (Marcus theory), and the 1987 Nobel Physiology or Medicine laureate who discovered how the immune system generates antibody diversity. What is the sum of their ages at death?

Consider the two Nobel laureates who died in July 2026 — the one who won the Nobel Prize in Chemistry for electron-transfer theory, and the one who won the Nobel Prize in Physiology or Medicine for antibody diversity. How many years apart were the years in which they won their Nobel Prizes?

Two figures died on the same day, 13 July 2026: the Australian-American political cartoonist who won the 1967 Pulitzer for editorial cartooning, and the actor who played Dr. Alan Grant in Jurassic Park. How many years older was the cartoonist than the actor at death?

Two people died on 8 July 2026: the American aviator and Mercury 13 member who became the oldest woman to travel to space, and the Welsh singer of 'Total Eclipse of the Heart'. What is the sum of their ages at death?
In July 2026 a US Senator from South Carolina died, and so did the first Irish actress to win an Academy Award for Best Supporting Actress (for My Left Foot). What is the sum of their ages at death?

In July 2026 the West Indies cricket all-rounder widely regarded as one of the greatest ever died, as did the English footballer nicknamed 'King Kev' who won the European Footballer of the Year award in 1978 and 1979. What is the sum of their ages at death?

Two actors died in July 2026: the American star of the 1970s TV series Emergency! who died on 9 July, and the New Zealand actor of the Jurassic Park films who died on 13 July. What is the sum of their ages at death?

In July 2026 the Pulitzer Prize-winning political cartoonist known for caricaturing US presidents died, and so did the American banker and philanthropist who founded First Premier Bank. What is the sum of their ages at death?

Of the following three people who died in July 2026 — the 1992 Nobel Chemistry laureate, the 1987 Nobel Medicine laureate, and the Oscar-winning Irish actress from My Left Foot — who was the oldest at death?
Of the following three people who died in July 2026 — the Mercury 13 aviator/astronaut, the Jurassic Park actor, and the footballer nicknamed 'King Kev' — who was the oldest at death?
Two notable men died on the same day, 11 July 2026: a US Senator from South Carolina and a Japanese-American Nobel laureate in Physiology or Medicine. Which of the two was older at death?
Comparing the US Senator from South Carolina who died on 11 July 2026 and the English footballer 'King Kev' who died on 20 July 2026, which one was older at death?
In their Q2 2026 results reported on 14 July 2026, what was the combined net income of JPMorgan Chase and Goldman Sachs (JPMorgan's net income plus Goldman Sachs's net earnings)?
In their Q2 2026 earnings reported on 14 July 2026, which reported the higher diluted earnings per share: JPMorgan Chase or Goldman Sachs?

Add the number of Emmy nominations received by the leading drama series in the 2026 Primetime Emmy nominations to the death toll Al Jazeera reported for the north and northeastern India floods and landslides on 20 July 2026. What is the total?
Which was the larger dollar figure: the value of Sky's July 2026 agreement to acquire ITV's Media & Entertainment arm, or the worldwide opening-weekend gross of Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey?
answer: Sky's acquisition of ITV's Media & Entertainment arm

question: Add the number of small satellites that make up NASA's SunRISE mission (which switched to a SpaceX Falcon Heavy in July 2026) to the age at which the American aviator Wally Funk (who died on 8 July 2026) first flew to space. What is the total?
Which had the higher magnitude: the earthquake that struck offshore Chiapas, Mexico on 17 July 2026, or the mainshock of the Venezuela earthquake doublet of June 2026?

Among these four people who died in July 2026 — the 1992 Nobel Chemistry laureate, the Pulitzer-winning political cartoonist, the footballer 'King Kev', and the Oscar-winning Irish actress from My Left Foot — how many were aged 90 or older at death?
Combining the four largest U.S. bank Q2 2026 (April-June) results reported in July 2026, what was the total net income of Bank of America, Wells Fargo, Citigroup, and Morgan Stanley?
In their Q2 2026 (April-June) results reported in July 2026, how much larger was General Motors' total revenue than Johnson & Johnson's total revenue?
In their Q2 2026 results reported in July 2026, how much larger was PepsiCo's net revenue than Abbott Laboratories' total sales?
Which company reported higher total (GAAP) revenue in its Q2 2026 results released 16 July 2026: GE Aerospace or Abbott Laboratories?
By how many percentage points did the United States' June 2026 headline annual CPI inflation rate exceed the euro area's June 2026 annual inflation rate?
By how many percentage points was Singapore's Q2 2026 year-on-year GDP growth (advance estimate) higher than China's Q2 2026 year-on-year GDP growth, both released in July 2026?
After the Bank of Korea raised its base rate to 2.75% on 16 July 2026, by how many percentage points did South Korea's June 2026 annual CPI inflation rate exceed that new base rate?

In July 2026, by how many percentage points did the additional tariff rate President Trump imposed on Canadian goods (proclamations signed 20 July 2026) exceed the tariff rate he announced on Brazilian goods (mid-July 2026)?

Across three July 2026 launches - SpaceX's Transporter-17 rideshare (7 July), ULA's Atlas V Amazon Leo launch (2 July), and the Space Development Agency Falcon 9 launch (16 July) - how many satellites/payloads were deployed in total?
How many more satellites did SpaceX's Transporter-17 rideshare mission (7 July 2026) deploy than its Starlink 15-14 mission (13 July 2026)?

How many days after the FDA granted accelerated approval to Vera Therapeutics' atacicept (TRUTAKNA) for IgA nephropathy did the FDA's PDUFA target action date for MannKind's FUROSCIX ReadyFlow autoinjector fall, both in July 2026?
